chunk.text: et review in H1 The domestic antimony price started to experience obvious decrease process since June, and the decrease scale was around 9,000yuan/t. After entering July, the general domestic antimony market operated in stagnant, showing three features including being more reluctant to sell products, weak market demand and relatively steady price. In early July, major antimony oxide suppliers saw export growth to Europe, which pushed domestic antimony ingot operation and promoted antimony ingot producers to raise the quotation by around 2,000yuan/t. However, due to being lack of support from down-stream demand, the domestic antimony ingot quotation remained lack of motivation to increase and after experiencing short-time growth, fell down, basically returning the previous 68,000-70,000yuan/t and maintained the level to the end of July. The price of antimony oxide slipped a little compared with that at the beginning of July. The demand from down-stream market was weak and market participants commonly predicted the future market not good. By considering cost factor, market participants believe there is limited space for antimony ingot price to drop.

relations.evidence: domestic antimony price started to experience obvious decrease process since June, and the decrease scale was around 9,000yuan/t.

chunk.text: Minor Metals Monthly No.149 Website: www.antaike.com 2 Highlight Tianqi Lithium adds investment to expand the original lithium hydroxide project Sichuan Tianqi Lithium Industries Inc. (Tianqi Lithium) announced on Jul. 16 that in order to satisfy market’s demand, it planned to add the investment in a lithium hydroxide production line to 53.9mln yuan from the original 51.8mlm yuan, and the project’s capacity of lithium hydroxide will also be raised to 5ktpy from the previous 4ktpy. The 5kpy capacity includes 3kt for battery and 2kt for industry. It is expected to realize 16.58mln yuan of net profit after seeing the project operated at full capacity. Tianqi Lithium was founded in October 1995. It is located in Shehong County, Southwest China, the center of Chengdu-Chongqing Economic Development Zone. The company has been focusing on the development, production and sales of lithium chemicals products for more than 10 years. chunk.text: redicted the future market not good. By considering cost factor, market participants believe there is limited space for antimony ingot price to drop. Seen from antimony products export market, the export price of antimony ingot (99.65%) dropped to US$12,300-12,600/t at the end of July from US$12,900-13,200/t at the beginning of the month. The export price of antimony oxide (99.5%) stabilized at US$9,900-10,100/t at most time of July and slipped to US$9,800-10,000/t at the end of the July. Purchasers in major consumption region replenished small volume of stock before leaving market to have summer holidays, affected by which, the market transaction situation at the beginning of July turned better in short term. In accordance with price collected by Antaike, the quotation of antimony ingot (99.65%) in July kept lingering in the range of 68,000-71,000yuan/t. The quotation appeared to rise in small scale at the beginning of July, but still seemed to be steady in the whole month. The average quotation of antimony ingot (99.65% in Jualy was 68,300-70,000yuan/t, down by 5.5% m-o-m and 21%

relations.evidence: Supply and demand In the recent two months, except for several large size antimony products producers in domestic market kept normal production,

chunk.text: Minor Metals Monthly No.149 Website: www.antaike.com 4 smelters, the transaction in antimony concentrate market was slow recently, and both the price and transaction volume didn’t see obvious change. Currently, producers of antimony products face large pressure from stock. Under the current market consumption capability, the stock still needs half year to be digested if there wasn’t any new output. However, the current antimony price led enterprises to have no profit to obtain, even suffer deficit. Due to cost factor, producers and traders would like to hold products to wait rather than reducing price sell products. Seen from the down-stream market, domestic market remained in weak situation and the operation rate of antimony down-stream related industry was commonly as low as 40%-60%. Domestic purchasers hold watching and waiting attitude, hoping to see price to continue to slip. Market transactions kept at low level, which had negative influence on the demand for antimony products.

relations.evidence: producers of antimony products face large pressure from stock

chunk.text: de, hoping to see price to continue to slip. Market transactions kept at low level, which had negative influence on the demand for antimony products. Due to summer holidays, foreign customers are having holidays without will to purchase products, so overseas demand is in weak period, and most market participants hold negative attitude on future market. Therefore, it is predicted that the demand will be in low level recently and the whole market will be in watching and waiting situation. Policies In accordance with Cargo Import and Export Regulations and Export Commodity Quota Management Approach, MOFCOM recently issued the second batch of export quota for non-ferrous metals in 2012, and the volume accounts for 40% of the yearly total, which mainly counted by referring to the output, export and export quota from 2009 to 2011. Meanwhile, in order to supply convenience to exporters, it is regulated that since Aug. 1, 2012, exporters of tungsten, antimony and molybdenum could apply for quota adjustment function on relative website in accordance with market demand, and they don’t need to submit an application to COMFOM anymore.

Among which, the import of antimony concentrate in June was 5,112t, up by 56.95% m-o-m and 30,251t in H1, down by 2.75% y-o-y. In Jun. 2012, China mainly imported antimony concentrate from Russia, Thailand, Tajikistan, Myanmar and Australia. The export to those five countries accounts for 94% of the total. China exported 5,601t antimony products in June and 24,871t in Jan.-Jun., up by 0.53% y-o-y. Among which, the export of antimony oxide was 3,466t in Jun., down by 9.67% y-o-y, and it was mainly exported to USA, Taiwan Province, Hongkong and Japan.

chunk.text: which, the export of antimony oxide was 3,466t in Jun., down by 9.67% y-o-y, and it was mainly exported to USA, Taiwan Province, Hongkong and Japan. The total export of antimony oxide in H1 was 20,197t, down by 6.38% y-o-y. The export of unwrought antimony in June was 2,095t, up by 26.74% m-o-m and total export of it in H1 was 4,562t, up by 76.48% y-o-y. Both the import and export of Chinese antimony products saw obvious growth compared with that in May, especially the antimony concentrate, seeing 57% growth m-o-m. The total export of antimony concentrate in H1 dropped a little. The export in Jun, that of unwrought antimony continued to grow, while that of antimony oxide slipped a little. The major feather of antimony products export in H1 should be the surge of unwrought antimony export. Outlook In according to above analysis, the current antimony market features could be concluded as antimony concentrate supply steady, antimony products output continued to shrink and antimony products consumption obviously weakened.

chunk.text: e concluded as antimony concentrate supply steady, antimony products output continued to shrink and antimony products consumption obviously weakened. Therefore, under the continuous gloomy economy environment, domestic antimony major production region objectively suspended or cut production to tighten the supply, which should play positive role in stabilizing antimony price. Both the global and domestic demand was weak and market operation was slow, and down-stream customers held watching and waiting attitude in order to avoid price slipping risk. It is predicted that the situation wouldn’t be improved until the end of the third quarter. Most of market participants are watching now, and partial traders are preparing to purchase products after price going down. However, considering the current economy future is not clear, Antaike believes the slow market won’t last long time. Seen from the antimony price in July, the drop scale has shrunken, and it is predicted the price

relations.evidence: antimony concentrate supply steady, antimony products output continued to shrink

chunk.text: Minor Metals Monthly No.149 Website: www.antaike.com 7 may slip down in small scale in short term. However, considering cost, the market held attitude of being reluctant to sell products. Antimony price in July appeared to have capability to defend drop trend, which indicates that antimony price is likely to be steady in short and middle time. Generally, Antaike believes that the domestic antimony price will become more difficult to be steady in August and remains under large pressure of going down. The current antimony price is around cost line, so it has limited space to drop. It is forecasted that the average price of antimony ingot (99.65%) in August will be around 69,000yuan/t, and the average price of domestic antimony ingot (99.65%0 in the third quarter will be in the range of 65,000-70,000yuan/t, and the international market standard II antimony average price will be above US$ 12,300/t.

relations.evidence: Antimony price in July appeared to have capability to defend drop trend, which indicates that antimony price is likely to be steady in short and middle time.

Cobalt Market Overview Domestic Market Market review Currently many domestic smelters have stopped or cut production, as the producers lacked profit or stayed in a state of loss, thus they were not willing to sell the products at a lower price; however due to lack of order in the field of domestic terminal consumption, the demand for cobalt decreased, the downstream consumers basically bought products for instant consumption and the transaction was not active, leading domestic cobalt followed the downward trend with international market. The average domestic cobalt price was 222,700yuan/t in Jul., down by 5.44% m-o-m. In terms of comparison of Changjiang spot market and MB quotation, due to serious domestic supply surplus, the price in the first two months of 2012 and that in Q2 2012 was upside down.

relations.evidence: the producers lacked profit or stayed in a state of loss, thus they were not willing to sell the products at a lower price

chunk.text: spot market and MB quotation, due to serious domestic supply surplus, the price in the first two months of 2012 and that in Q2 2012 was upside down. Entering Jul., the spreads at home and abroad has narrowed down, domestic cobalt price gained support from cobalt raw material cost, the decreasing rate was less than global market, which led domestic cobalt price to be higher than global price in July. chunk.text: o-y. In conclusion, import of cobalt raw material was about 12,581t in H1 2012, down by 25.3% y-o-y compared with 16,849t in the same period of 2011. In respect of import raw material, as domestic smelters basically stayed in a state of loss operation and thinking about reducing cost, they adhered to import high cobalt content products such as intermediate products of cobalt wet-processing metallurgy and alliage blanc, thus import increased. The main reason for the decreasing import was that cobalt price stayed at a low level in H2 2012, domestic smelters proved less willing to import raw material and they began to consume inventory or adhered to purchase domestic cobalt salt as production raw material; besides, partial domestic smelters stopped or reduced production, which also lowered the demand for cobalt material. 1.2 Consumption 1.2.1 Export of lithium cobalt oxide ups 79.1% y-o-y in H1 2012 Export of lithium cobalt oxide was 3,406t in H1 2012, up by 79.1% y-o-y, export in 2012 is expected to approach 7,000t, mainly export to battery producers South Korea and Japan.

chunk.text: he Customs surveyed Jinchuan Group Co., Ltd. (JNMC) on July 26, 2012 within China Nonferrous Metals Industry Association Cobalt Branch co-ordination. Accompanied by the leaders, the research people visited ore concentrating plant, nickel oxidation-rich top blowing refining project, nickel refining pressure leaching project, 10ktpy cobalt project, 200ktpy refined copper project and their mine park on the morning of Jul. 26. Relative leaders of JNMC reported basic information, problems and policy. The major operation problems are as follows: firstly, sharp decreasing of main product price, reducing earning power; secondly, capital gap, contradiction of supply and demand; thirdly, high transportation cost and stock insurance saving cost; fourthly, decreasing ore grade of owned mines and increasing ore cost; fifth, tension raw material supply, less high quality raw material, difficult for purchasing; sixthly, backward relevant facility directly affected development. The leaders of the People’s Republic of China and the Customs proposed some suggestion.

chunk.text: onable method to solve the problem. 1.4 Import & export 1.4.1 Import data Chinese refined cobalt import reached 1,151t in H1 2012, down by 33% y-o-y. Import of cobalt salt reached 372t, up by 74.6% y-o-y, of which, import of cobalt dioxide and cobalt hydroxide accounted for 72.3% of total, import of cobalt tetroxide accounted for 27.4% of total. The sharp decreasing of refined cobalt import was mainly due to the serious supply surplus on domestic refined cobalt market and the demand for refined cobalt still maintained a downward trend, refined cobalt price stayed a low level in recent years, leading a decline in domestic importers’ willingness to import. 1.4.2 Export data Export of refined cobalt was 1,721t in H1 2012, up by 11% y-o-y; export of cobalt powder was 280t, down by 2.1% y-o-y; export of cobalt salt was 2,214t, up by 10.2% y-o-y, among which, export of cobalt tetroxide was 1,554t, up by 20.4% y-o-y; export of cobalt carbonate was 278t, down by 39% y-o-y; export of cobalt oxalate was 234t, up by 179% y-o-y; export of cobalt dioxide and cobalt hydroxide was 127t, down by 3.1% y-o-y.

, down by 39% y-o-y; export of cobalt oxalate was 234t, up by 179% y-o-y; export of cobalt dioxide and cobalt hydroxide was 127t, down by 3.1% y-o-y. As a whole, import of domestic refined cobalt, cobalt powder, cobalt salt was 4,215t, up by 9.6% y-o-y. The reason for increasing export was mainly due to serious surplus on domestic market, a slowdown in cobalt demand led global cobalt price was almost higher than domestic price and the exporting enterprises lifted their willing to export. 1.5 Outlook Overall, domestic cobalt price will followed the trend of global market; domestic smelters obtained support from high production cost, they preferred to reduce production rather than further cut cobalt price. Domestic cobalt price looks unlikely to decrease in future. Indium Market Overview The indium price increased a bit in July. The refined indium price increased to RMB 3,550-3,600/kg from RMB 3,500-3,600/kg during the month, up by 0.7%. Meanwhile, the crude indium price climbed by RMB 50/kg to RMB 3,250-3,300/kg. chunk.text: ing for export quota in 2013. The Ministry of Commerce of P.R.C. should consider the situation when drafting the export quota plan for the next year. It is the hardest year in 2012 for indium export after 2009. The global ITO plants’ combined operation rate is less than 70% so far this year. The smuggle is also the common issues. According to the related countries’ statistics, Japan imported 5.92 tonnes of indium from China in H1, 2012; South Korea imported 26.51 tonnes; the United States imported 12 tonnes, which totaled 44.43 tonnes, about 12 times of the statistics from China Customs. This year, the investors paid more attentions on the product. There were some market participators joined in the indium market with big capital, which supported the indium price, and were against the potential decline.

relations.evidence: indium export quota in 2013

News in Brief Lithium Lithium cobalt oxide export in H1 2012 reaches 3.4kt In according to the latest statistics released by China Customs, China exported 629t lithium cobalt oxide in Jun. 2012 and 3,406t in H1. There are three companies having large export volume, including Tianjin Bamo Technology Co., Ltd, Hunan Ruixiang New Material Co., Ltd and Beijing Dangsheng Material Technology Co., Ltd. Ganfeng Lithium sees 38.34% growth in net profit in H1 Ganfeng Lithium Co., Ltd (Ganfeng Lithium, SZ: 002460) released short report about revenue on Jul. 23. According to which, the company realized 32.6mln yuan of net profit, up by 38.34% y-o-y. Ganfeng Lithium created 299mln yuan of operation revenue in H1, up by 51.96% y-o-y and realized 0.22yuan EPS, up by 37.5% y-o-y.

chunk.text: Minor Metals Monthly No.149 Website: www.antaike.com 13 subsidiary extends 2 years lithium mine’s mining right 600139) announced on Jul. 24 that its wholly-owned subsidiary Jiangxi Western Resources Lithium Co., Ltd (Jiangxi Lithium) recently received Mining License issued by Jiangxi MLR. The mining license validity got extended by 2 years from Jul. 27 2012 to Jul. 27 2014. Jiangxi Lithium was founded by Western Resources in March 2010. Take Jiangxi Lithium as the main body, Western Resources acquired 100% shares of Ganzhou Jingtai Lithium Co., Ltd and Ningdu taili Lithium Co., Ltd’s mining right of Heyuan Spodumene Mine which is reported to have 59.5kt Li2O reserve (metal content). Based in Sichuan Province, Western Resources is engaged in mining and concentrating of non-ferrous metals industry. Lengshuijiang City’s antimony enterprises supervised well It is reported that South China Supervision Center’s official carried out site supervision on Jul. 6 on the company of related leaders from Hunan Emergency Center and Loudi City Environment Protection Bureau. At the end of 2010, Environment Protection Department implemented supervision for 8 enterprises involved in antimony in Xikuangshan Region, Lengshuijiang City, Loudi City, Hunan Province. After two years rectification, there have been 75 antimony smelters shut down and 145 small size manual concentration workshops. Up to now, among the 8 enterprises, 6 ones has passed the test and other two ones are re-choosing address to prepare for re-construction. chunk.text: 12 up by 27% m-o-m In accordance with statistics released by China Customs, China exported 2,095t unwrought antimony in Jun. 2012, up by 26.7% m-o-m. They were mainly exported to USA, Netherlands, South Korea and Mexico, respectively being 1,139t, 247t, 160t and 146t, accounting for 81% of the total export volume. The total export of unwrought antimony in H1 was 4,562t, up by 76.5% y-o-y. The first top countries the unwrought antimony exported to in H1 was respectively USA, Japan, Hong Kong and Netherlands. The second batch of W-Sb-In-Mo export quota to be released MOFCOM announced that it planned to issue the second batch export quota for tungsten, antimony, tin, silver, indium and molybdenum in 2012. The second batch quota accounted for 40% of the yearly total. Among which, the export quota for antimony (physical weight) is planned to be 26,905t. Cobalt Gansu to accelerate Cu-Ni-Co-W-Mo nonferrous metals deep-processing It is reported that Gansu Government recently issued Gansu Implements Western Development “The Twelfth Five Years” Plan’s Implementation Opinion which suggested to accelerate development in regions rich in resources and construct a batch of bases for important mineral resources development. According to the opinion, the province’s Hexi Region will accelerate Ni-Cu-Co nonferrous metals deep-processing base will be promoted to be constructed. Vanadium Shan Steel Group creates new low V-N alloy price in Aug. It is reported that Shandong Iron-steel Group Co., Ltd purchased 170t V-N alloy in August this year at the price of 118,000yuan/t ( concluding tax, redemption price), creating new low record. Among the total 170t, the group bought 40t from Jinan Steel Group, 90t from Laisteel Group and 40t from Zhangsteel Group. The purchase price in Jul. was 124,600yuan/t.

According to which, there are 24 enterprises in the list that comprises 5 coke enterprises with 2.35Mtpy capacity; only one ferroalloy enterprise with 6.5ktpy capacity and other capacities. Germanium Yunnan Germanium realizes 44.21mln yuan net profit in H1 Yunnan Germanium Corporation (SZ: 002428) released the half year financial report in H1 2012 on Jul. 29. According to the report, the company realized 115mln yuan of operation income, down by 5.79% y-o-y. The net profit belonging to listed company’s share holders was 44.21mln yuan, up by 0.41% y-o-y. The EPS was 0.14yuan. The company also announced the operation profit suffered 20.85% decrease, mainly due to the acquisition of Beijing Zhongke Jiaying Semiconductor Co., Ltd’s 65% shares. The company acquired suffered 2.32mln yuan of deficit in H1 2012. In addition, more raw material were purchased from overseas market, which increased the cost.

China Metal Seminar October 17th Summary , 2012 London Antaike, the leading information provider and consulting company for nonferrous metals industry in Beijing, China, with twenty year-history in the field, will bring the top analysts of LME-traded metals and officials from top traders and producers from China to London during the LME week. Ten presentations will be delivered in one day to give you insight into Chinese base metal market and minor metal market. – Registration fee: £800 – Early-bird discount Register before August 31, 10% discount – Discount for multiple registers: Additional 10% discount for two or more registers from the same company Fees include all seminar materials and refreshments.
